description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS that runs on every pull request, push, and published release. Use a single macos-11.0 job that checks out the repository, installs dependencies with Homebrew, builds ninja with CMake and Xcode, tests ninja with ctest, creates a ninja archive with 7z, uploads the archive as an artifact, and uploads the archive as a release asset if the workflow is triggered by a published release.
